name: Almond Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt.
2. Set aside.
3. In a saucepan, melt butter over low heat. Add sugar and water, stirring until the mixture just comes to a boil.
4. Remove from heat and stir in chocolate chip morsels and vanilla until smooth.
5. Pour the chocolate mixture into a mixing bowl.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
7. Blend in the flour mixture.
8. Stir in the remaining chocolate chip morsels and chopped almonds.
9. Spread batter evenly into a 9-inch square baking pan.
10. Bake for 30 minutes at 325°F (160°C).
11. Allow to cool before cutting into squares.
